query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `livestream_sets` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `livestreamId` int NOT NULL,
  `setName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `setPrice` int NOT NULL,
  `quantitySold` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `totalOriginalPrice` int DEFAULT 0,
  `discountRate` int DEFAULT 0,
  `totalRevenue` int DEFAULT 0,
  `sortOrder` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `livestream_set_items` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `setId` int NOT NULL,
  `productName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `originalPrice` int NOT NULL,
  `sortOrder` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
